text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Running... is my way of praying.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Cough, cough...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I gasp for air, and that's when it hits me. That's when it's shoved in my face—the fact that I am breathing.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(A vertex of the Winter Hexagon, and one of twenty-one
first-magnitude stars. Twinkling with a gentle red light... is Pollux.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(And there... just like any other night, I know you're watching over
me.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Need to get going.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I pray. Not by clasping my hands, but by kicking the dirt. Hoping
that the splendor waiting further along this path, the warmth, all of
it...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (...will find its way to you.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost tryouts, a crucial event where trainers scout out promising
new talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Visiting the racecourse, I find myself among many of my colleagues
also here to watch the fledgling runners practice for their big day.
choice_data_list: (I think I have the list of runners somewhere...)

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! How about that turn of foot just now!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She knows exactly when to make her move too... Admire Vega is
quickly becoming my top pick for tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing a name I also had marked on my list, I quickly turn my
attention to the track.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, wheeze... Th-thank you for running with me!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Likewise. Are you done?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... I have plans to grab dinner with Urara and a few others. Oh,
um... If you want, you're welcome to—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll pass. I'm... going to run a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah! R-right... Uh... Don't overdo it!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the others head off to meet with friends, she alone continues to
train, not looking the least bit bothered at missing out.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hahh!
choice_data_list:
(That acceleration! I guess the rumors weren't
for nothing.)

(That acceleration! I guess the rumors weren't
for nothing.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sheer amount of talent I sense from her sends a chill down my
spine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega. She has a bright future ahead of her, no doubt about it.
But I wonder...
choice_data_list: (Just what kind of person is she?)
(Just what kind of person is she?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back in my office, I begin poring over every scrap of paper I can find
on her. By the time I resurface from my sea of documents, it's dark
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I step outside, figuring I should get back to the trainers' dorm, only to
find...
choice_data_list: Wait, is someone on the track?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The place is deserted except for the lone runner. She looks utterly
exhausted, but despite that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Come on! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She doesn't let up. Her pace refuses to slack. It's almost as if...
choice_data_list: As if she's being hounded by something...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, she seems to yield to the fatigue. As her footsteps give way
to silence, she turns her eyes toward the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Flooded with so many stars, her eyes seem to waver, as if anxious that
they might be swallowed up by that vast sea.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm caught off guard by my own question. It just slipped out.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. I always do this.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pretty much.
choice_data_list: And it's not too hard on you?
And it's not too hard on you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No. It's what I need to do to win.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And I... will win. Run, and win. That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If you have trainer business to discuss, wait until after tryouts. Good
night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lights shut off abruptly, leaving only the starlight to illuminate
her as she walks off, melting into the night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A tremendous burden seems to weigh upon her, so heavy it drives her
to the point of self-sacrifice. In the following days, it weighs on my
mind as well.
